email.title: Email
email.description: Email address for the Roborock account that owns or has access to the vacuum.

password.title: Password
password.description: Roborock account password. Used for password login or as a fallback when no encrypted token is available.

encryptedToken.title: Encrypted Token
encryptedToken.description: Encrypted Roborock session data. This is created and managed by the plugin UI after a successful login.

skipDevices.title: Skip Devices
skipDevices.description: Comma-separated Roborock serial numbers or DUIDs to ignore during discovery.

baseURL.title: Region
baseURL.description: Roborock cloud region endpoint. Choose the region used by your Roborock account.

debugMode.title: Debug Mode
debugMode.description: Write verbose Roborock API, discovery, and transport diagnostics to the Homebridge log.
